content: Solana Actions are spec-compliant HTTPS endpoints (GET returns metadata+label+links.actions; POST with {account} returns base64 serialized transaction, message, optional links.next for chaining). Blinks are client wrappers around Action URLs (solana-action:<url>) rendering UI and routing to wallet for signing. Client-side flow: GET metadata, render button(s) per links.actions, on click POST {account:walletPubkey}, base64-decode tx, set feePayer+recentBlockhash if unsigned, sign via wallet adapter, send to RPC. Next.js SDK @solana/actions; wallet via @solana/wallet-adapter-react with Phantom/Solflare. actions.json at domain root maps site URLs to Action API paths and must return Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *. Dialect registry only gates social-feed unfurling, not in-app blinks.
